FRONTIER-SHUMIT_CHARACTER.title: Shumit
FRONTIER-SHUMIT_CHARACTER.description: One of the pioneers dragged into another world. He raises his hammer and carves a path to return to his home world. By trade, he is a blacksmith who forges gear for the battlefield.
FRONTIER-SHUMIT_CHARACTER.cardsModifierD: Shumit cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
FRONTIER-SHUMIT_CHARACTER.goldMonologue: [sine]Enough iron, and I can forge a road home.[/sine]
FRONTIER-SHUMIT_CHARACTER.unlockText: A blacksmith from another world, forging his way home.
